summary: Iteration 197: Tested all 5 readiness endpoints for the inbox cleanup feature. All 20 backend tests passed. The force cleanup endpoint (POST /api/readiness/sync-status) correctly implements 7 rules and returns proper JSON structure. The inbox-diagnostic endpoint correctly previews what cleanup would do. All endpoints return proper data structures and status codes.
critical_code_review_comments: readiness.py lines 71-211: POST /sync-status correctly implements 7 cleanup rules using $and queries to avoid $or key collisions
readiness.py lines 215-305: GET /inbox-diagnostic correctly previews cleanup impact with breakdown by rule
readiness.py lines 308-443: GET /automation-rate returns comprehensive metrics including daily_trend and top_manual_vendors
document_readiness_service.py lines 463-800: evaluate_and_persist correctly syncs document status when readiness is ready
document_readiness_service.py lines 827-972: batch_reevaluate_all prioritizes held docs first, then processes remaining up to limit
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing preview environment data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 197 verified all inbox cleanup endpoints. Key findings: (1) GET /api/readiness/inbox-diagnostic returns {total_in_inbox, would_fix, would_remain_after_cleanup, breakdown, action}. (2) POST /api/readiness/sync-status returns 7 rule counts (rule1_has_bc_pi through rule7_readiness_catchall) plus total_fixed, remaining_in_inbox, message. (3) POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all returns {total_processed, total_corrections, by_status, auto_acted, errors}. (4) GET /api/readiness/automation-rate returns {automation_rate, total_documents, distribution, daily_trend}. (5) GET /api/readiness/metrics returns {total_documents, by_status, by_action, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons}. Current state: 2 docs remain in inbox (both blocked needing manual review), 27 total docs, 29.6% automation rate.

backend_api_tests: Integration: diagnostic then cleanup consistency - PASS

inbox_diagnostic_response.note: Both remaining docs are blocked and need manual review

sync_status_response.message: Force cleanup complete: 0 documents moved out of Inbox. 2 documents still need manual attention.
